sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for NES version

special_mechanics.name: climbing
special_mechanics.description: Player monsters can climb buildings by jumping and grappling, then punch them to pieces

special_mechanics.name: grabbing_objects
special_mechanics.description: Monsters can grab and eat NPCs and food items found in windows throughout buildings

special_mechanics.name: damage_and_devolution
special_mechanics.description: When taking excessive damage, monster reverts to human form and walks off screen. Damage sources include bullets, shells, dynamite, punches from other monsters, lightning, and falling

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/Qualitative only. No numerical physics parameters documented in available sources. Game focuses on destruction and climbing mechanics rather than precise platforming physics. Sources provide gameplay mechanics overview but no technical movement data.
